title: Online E-Learning Package
excerpt: A util ition afraid of losing your skills during lockdown so here's the issue many clinicians are facing at the moment as you get further and further away from your last patient that you treated you start to feel a little bit less confident and this is something I've experienced …

segments.text: a util ition afraid of losing your skills during lockdown so here's the issue many clinicians are facing at the moment as you get further and further away from your last patient that you treated you start to feel a little bit less confident and this is something I've experienced myself - I'm actually remembered doing teacher of training in particular I had a holiday book right after I did my training I remember leaving that clinic feeling raring to go couldn't wait to treat my first patients and then as I got further and further away from that training course I got less and less confident until it actually started to scare me a bit doing a tear trough and now thankfully obviously I got over that and but it's not just me and it's not just you if you feel that way this is actually what our brains do when we don't use information quickly and they actually it actually discards it because it thinks I'll use that neurological effort and energy to do something else with that's actually

more relevant to my survival and this is what all of us do over time if you learn something on a day do a course 50% of that information will be gone within 24 hours and within 48 hours about 80% of it is gone and that's really scary so we need a solution for that so what I've done is I've asked my team to pull as many of the resources as they can from out both the clinic and our training school to put together a package of information and resources that's really gonna help you get back to practicing with confidence as soon as possible so let's take a look at everything that's included in this one-off offer first up is lip masters 3 with this course you're come out of lockdown understanding how to consult and treat using the latest techniques we've also just updated it for 2020 including Russian lips the 4 millimeter needle technique next on the list includes our foundations of botulinum toxin course this includes injection techniques the many subtle ways you can massively reduce side effects wastage and follow-ups or getting great results next

we have foundations of dermal filler all the core injection techniques you need to restore particularly the lower face it allow you to restore the key areas with confidence and to do safe techniques station tips are also sprinkled throughout next up is our eyelash serum training this works really well because you can actually do it online and provide this to your customers through the internet it includes all the processes consent forms are marketing pact advice leaflets we've also thrown in our Instagram for business course now this we built with the help of a professional marketer and it gives you the best examples from the industry loads of tips and tricks about how to reach more people how to communicate with them in a way that builds trust so that you actually get the result that you want we're not just providing training in this course we're also including a bumper pack of amazing resources that will help you actually implement these new changes to your clinic we include clinical business and safety system there's a business backbone guide included this is so vital

so many people don't understand this until it's too late but you've got to build a business that meets your personal goals together this pack is going to help you emerge from lockdown way sharper than you went in you're gonna have more services to offer better clinical skills a safer system better communication skills better processes better documents all of this for less than half the usual price you'll get a 14 day money back guarantee you'll be able to spread your payment's and you can also have lifetime access to our Facebook support network I'm really starting to feel a potential energy building up with my clients many of them are in boxing so when are you gonna open I really want to see you I think there's going to be an elastic effects happening with this lockdown and I really want you to be ready for it so if you're feeling like you've lost a bit of confidence over the lockdown and you want to be on the front foot and maybe learn a whole lot of new stuff as well make sure you take advantage of this unique offer we're pooling resources together that we've never shared with anyone stuff from building our own

clinic things from the skin beaver clinic side as well as all of the best stuff from our training side that's gonna prepare you for the best possible start to the end of this lockdown so click the link and secure it for yourself now [Music]
